revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-265

Light issuing from a source or optical apparatus in undesired directions.


Note: In the particular case when light is reflected by the lantern glazing (panes), the light is said to produce False Flashes.


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Stray Light}}
